protocol: 2x Opus 4.8 + 2x Codex gpt-5.5 xhigh blind, arbiter (session) aggregation; verification layer passed on trade candidate

items.title: Will Donald J. Trump attend The 2026 FIFA World Cup Final?
items.rationale: Core: FIFA president Infantino publicly confirmed (~Jul 1) Trump will CO-PRESENT the trophy at the Final (Jul 19, MetLife NJ); NBC reports the White House is 'holding' the date on his schedule; resolution is very generous (brief appearance or his own social post counts). Risk: 14-day tail = acute health/security/geopolitical emergency (~4-6%). Divergence negligible (families 0.945 vs 0.935); verification-layer news search confirmed the trophy role and found no adverse signal (the 'Trump snubs USMNT' item refers to a group-stage US game, not the Final). Consensus ~0.94 vs market yes_ask 0.88; half-anchor floor 0.91 not binding.

items.title: Will BTC trimmed mean be above $67,500.00 by 11:59 PM ET on Jul 31, 2026?
items.rationale: One-touch barrier +7.3% above $62,904 spot (log 0.0706) over ~26 days. Core disagreement (family divergence 0.25 >> 0.10): Opus family shaded the reflection-principle raw touch (~0.6-0.67 at 3% daily vol) down hard for negative post-crash drift (June -20.5%, 43% green days) and index-trimming of brief wicks -> 0.32; Codex family held near the raw touch math -> 0.57. Families straddle the market (0.32 below, 0.57 above) so they disagree on the SIGN of the edge, not just size. FLAGGED for human review; engine auto-skips on >0.10 divergence. System working as designed, not a failure.

items.title: The Odyssey (Nolan) Rotten Tomatoes score Above 90?
items.rationale: Strict >90 threshold on Nolan's 13th film (wide release Jul 17, RT determined Mon Jul 20). Core: ~4 of 12 prior Nolan films cleared strictly >90; recent prestige (Oppenheimer 93, Dunkirk 92) clusters just above, but ambitious epics dipped (Interstellar 73, Tenet 69). Risk: NO review data yet (embargoed to ~Jul 16-17) = no information edge over the market. Families 0.47 vs 0.37 (divergence ~0.10), consensus ~0.42 vs market ~0.40 -> ~2pt edge, below threshold. No trade; no informational advantage.
